name: Lines Infinite
detailed_description:
Lines X


About the Game

Lines Infinite is a Numberlink-based puzzle game involving finding paths to connect colored tiles in a grid.

  • 100 brain-teasing Numberlink puzzles of different shapes
  • Random level generator
  • Beautiful abstract design, 10 color themes
  • 8 ambient relaxing soundtracks
  • 100 achievements with Latin & Cyrillic characters
  • 15 Trading Cards, Badge, Emoticons and Backgrounds (Coming soon)
  • Cross-platform saves via Steam Cloud
  • Windows, Mac & Linux
  • Play 100 more levels - Lines X
  • Get both with 25% discount - Lines Bundle
